title: ICAI Announces September-November 2026 Exam Schedule & CBIC Revises GST Rates for Beverages!
content:
# ICAI Announces September-November 2026 Exam Schedule & CBIC Revises GST Rates for Beverages!

Ek important update hai for all CA aspirants and businesses! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne September-November 2026 session ke liye CA Foundation, Intermediate, aur Final courses ka detailed examination schedule officially release kar diya hai. Along with this, Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) ne bhi GST rate notifications mein revisions kiye hain, jo Finance Act, 2026 ke saath align ho rahe hain, especially for non-alcoholic beverages.

### ICAI Examination Schedule - September-November 2026

*   **Announcement Date:** May 2, 2026.
*   **CA Foundation Exam Dates:** September 2, 5, 7, aur 9, 2026.
*   **CA Intermediate Exam Dates:**
    *   Group I: September 1, 3, aur 6, 2026.
    *   Group II: September 8, 10, aur 12, 2026.
*   **CA Final Exam Dates:**
    *   Group I: November 2, 4, aur 6, 2026.
    *   Group II: November 9, 11, aur 13, 2026.
*   **Post-Qualification Exams:** International Taxation Assessment Test (INTT-AT) aur Insurance & Risk Management (IRM) Technical Examination bhi November 2026 mein conduct kiye jaayenge.
*   **Application Timeline:**
    *   Online application window opens: July 6, 2026.
    *   Last date without late fee: July 19, 2026.
    *   Last date with late fee (Rs 600 in India / US $10 overseas): July 22, 2026.
    *   Correction window: July 23-25, 2026.
*   **Important Point:** ICAI ne clarify kiya hai ki notified exam dates change nahi honge, even if they coincide with public holidays.

### CBIC's GST Rate Revisions

*   **Notification Details:** Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) ne Notification No. 01/2026-Central Tax (Rate) dated April 30, 2026, release kiya hai.
*   **Effective Date:** Ye changes May 1, 2026, se effective hain.
*   **Impact:** Revisions hain GST, UTGST, aur IGST Rate Notifications mein, jo Finance Act, 2026 ke saath align ho rahe hain. Specifically, non-alcoholic beverage categories ke classification aur rates par asar padega.

## Read the Official Document

*   [Download the Official ICAI Announcement here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=19163)
*   [Download the Official CBIC GST Notification here](https://www.cbic.gov.in/GST/Notifications)

*Published on: 3 May 2026*
